llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three main coverage areas (health, property, travel) and additional services. The health coverage refers to 'Balanced Family Global Plan8', which is not listed in the ground-truth ratings, but it combines both physical and mental health coverage with global coverage and premium benefits. Based on the ideal_insurance_profile, the best match for physical and mental health coverage with global premium service is the 'EliteCare Premium Plan' (rating 10 for both physical and mental). The property coverage is comprehensive for high-value items, jewelry, art, and electronics, aligning with 'EliteHome Premium Coverage' (rating 10). The travel coverage includes medical evacuation, adventure sports, volunteer work, and emergency coordination with a global network, matching 'EliteTravel Premium Plan' (rating 10). The additional services include telemedicine, wellness programs, specialist access, and international volunteer coverage. These map to 'Telemedicine Services' (rating 9), 'Wellness Programs' (rating 9), and 'Specialist Access' (rating 10). No separate volunteer coverage rating appears, but it is part of travel coverage. Therefore, the mapped ratings are derived from the best corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings.
